Get On Top

Remember those days when you and your brother used to wrestle for hours until one of you cried and complained to Mom? It was a real duel, wasn't it? You would flip over together like a human ball, with arms and legs flying in the air. So, we've brought sibling wrestling to the virtual realm.

Play Get On Top Online

Loading game...
About Get On Top

Remember those days when you and your brother used to wrestle for hours until one of you cried and complained to Mom? It was a real duel, wasn't it? You would flip over together like a human ball, with arms and legs flying in the air. So, we've brought sibling wrestling to the virtual realm. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Get On Top in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Action game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Get On Top for free?

Yes. Get On Top is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Get On Top?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
